scope: GSC URL-level remediation decisions before Tilda production edits
source: Google Search Console Page indexing authenticated view

action_time_confirmation_required_for: Google Search Console validation or indexing requests
Yandex Webmaster/Metrica binding or settings changes

summary.first_batch: 404 URLs from GSC, because they include concrete link and redirect defects

rows.rationale: The URL is an external WhatsApp link accidentally wrapped as an internal moonn.ru path. This is a real user-flow defect and an SEO crawl waste.
implementation_plan: Find the button/link in Tilda that contains `http://wa.me/+79777770303` without a proper external URL setting.
Replace it with `https://wa.me/79777770303` or the approved current WhatsApp link.
Add a 301 redirect from `/http://wa.me/+79777770303` to the correct external/contact destination if Tilda supports it; otherwise make sure the broken internal link disappears from all pages.
After publication, re-run live crawl and then validate the GSC 404 group.

rows.rationale: This is likely a malformed asset reference where `static.tildacdn.com` was written as a relative/internal URL. It should not be an indexable site page.
implementation_plan: Search Tilda page HTML/links for `moonn.ru/static.tildacdn.com` or bare `static.tildacdn.com` used without protocol.
Replace asset references with full `https://static.tildacdn.com/...` URLs where needed.
Do not create an SEO page for this path.
Keep this path out of sitemap and index.

rows.rationale: The old Russian-transliterated burnout URL has search intent. There are live 200 pages about burnout, so this should not remain 404.
implementation_plan: Map the legacy path `/emotionalnaya-vygoranie` to the most relevant canonical burnout page.
Preferred first target: `/vigoranie_article` if it is the main public article on burnout.
Alternative target: `/emotional-intelligence/knowledge-base/burnout` if the EI knowledge-base page becomes the canonical evergreen page.
Improve the selected target with unique title, description, H1, internal links and Article/FAQ schema before asking GSC to reprocess.
rows.owner_question: Which page should become the canonical burnout page: `/vigoranie_article` or `/emotional-intelligence/knowledge-base/burnout`?

rows.rationale: The path means `requests/problems psychologist works with`. A matching live Tilda page exists as page120952796.html, but it has a weak technical URL. This should be normalized.
implementation_plan: Decide whether `/zaprocy` should become a public canonical alias for the page `ąĪ ą║ą░ą║ąĖą╝ąĖ ąĘą░ą┐čĆąŠčüą░ą╝ąĖ čĆą░ą▒ąŠčéą░ąĄčé ą┐čüąĖčģąŠą╗ąŠą│`.
If yes, set/keep a clean alias and redirect `/zaprocy.html` to `/zaprocy`.
If not, redirect both `/zaprocy` and `/zaprocy.html` to `/psiholog-konsultacii-moskva`.
Add internal links from consultation and services pages if the page stays indexable.
rows.owner_question: Keep a separate public page for `čü ą║ą░ą║ąĖą╝ąĖ ąĘą░ą┐čĆąŠčüą░ą╝ąĖ čĆą░ą▒ąŠčéą░ąĄčé ą┐čüąĖčģąŠą╗ąŠą│`, or fold it into the main consultation page?

rows.rationale: This is the .html version of the same legacy search-intent page and should be consolidated with the canonical URL.
implementation_plan: Apply the same canonical decision as `/zaprocy`.
Use one redirect chain only: `/zaprocy.html` -> final canonical URL.
Avoid leaving both `/zaprocy` and `/page120952796.html` as competing indexable pages.

rows.rationale: A live page exists for `ąæčŗčüčéčĆą░čÅ ą┐čüąĖčģąŠą╗ąŠą│ąĖčÅ ŌĆö ą╝ąĄčéąŠą┤ ąóą░čéčīčÅąĮčŗ ą£čāąĮąĮ`, but it is exposed as a page*.html URL. The legacy clean name should redirect to a clean canonical method page.
implementation_plan: Set a clean alias such as `/bystraya-psihologiya` for the method page, if this page is meant to rank.
Redirect `/bystraya-psihologiya.html` to the clean alias.
If the method page is not ready, temporarily redirect to homepage or consultation page, but do not leave 404.
Add Person/Service schema references to connect the method with Tatyana Munn/Kumskova.
rows.owner_question: Should `ąæčŗčüčéčĆą░čÅ ą┐čüąĖčģąŠą╗ąŠą│ąĖčÅ` be a separate SEO method page or a section of the homepage/consultation page?

rows.rationale: The old lectures URL should consolidate into the current lecture/speaker/event page rather than remain 404.
implementation_plan: Choose canonical lecture hub: `/lectures1` for lecture catalog, or `/vystupleniya-lekcii-treningi-psiholog-tatiana-moonn` for speaker/event landing.
Redirect `/leksii.html` to that canonical page.
Ensure the selected page has unique metadata around `ą╗ąĄą║čåąĖąĖ ąóą░čéčīčÅąĮčŗ ą£čāąĮąĮ`, `ą┐čüąĖčģąŠą╗ąŠą│ ą£ąōąŻ`, `čŹą╝ąŠčåąĖąŠąĮą░ą╗čīąĮčŗą╣ ąĖąĮčéąĄą╗ą╗ąĄą║čé`.
rows.owner_question: Which page is the canonical lecture hub: `/lectures1` or `/vystupleniya-lekcii-treningi-psiholog-tatiana-moonn`?

rows.rationale: A live page with a matching course title exists as a page*.html URL. It should either be productized with a clean URL or retired into the paid-products hub.
implementation_plan: Confirm whether the spiritual psychology course is an active product, archived product, or test page.
If active: assign a clean alias, unique metadata, product/course schema and redirect the old .html URL.
If archived/test: redirect to the paid-products hub or mark noindex/remove from sitemap.
Do not optimize it as active until the business status is confirmed.
rows.owner_question: Is `ąÜčāčĆčü ą┐ąŠ ą┤čāčģąŠą▓ąĮąŠą╣ ą┐čüąĖčģąŠą╗ąŠą│ąĖąĖ` an active paid product or an old/test page?

rows.rationale: Teen psychology has commercial/search value and a live service target. The old .html path should be redirected to the canonical service page.
implementation_plan: Use `/uslugi_podrostki` as the likely canonical service page if it is the strongest current page.
Redirect `/podrostki.html` to the selected canonical page.
If `/page120929166.html` is a stronger landing, give it a clean alias and avoid duplicate competition with `/uslugi_podrostki`.
Improve service metadata and internal links before GSC validation.

rows.rationale: The page is live but blocked by `Disallow: /psiholog`. It may be a duplicate landing. Blocking alone leaves a confusing live page state.
implementation_plan: Compare `/psiholog` with `/psiholog-konsultacii-moskva` and homepage.
If duplicate: redirect `/psiholog` to the main consultation page.
If active and unique: narrow robots.txt and open it to index with unique metadata/canonical.
Do not globally remove the robots rule until all `/psiholog*` paths are classified.

rows.rationale: `Disallow: /psiholog` also blocks this more specific landing because robots patterns are prefix-based. This may be accidental overblocking.
implementation_plan: Inspect whether this page has unique content/search intent or is a duplicate/test page.
If duplicate: redirect to `/psiholog-konsultacii-moskva`.
If active: remove/narrow the broad robots prefix and ensure the page has unique canonical metadata.
Keep staging checks before production robots changes.

rows.gsc_reason: Alternate page with proper canonical tag
rows.rationale: Yandex click-id parameters are expected alternate URLs if the canonical points to the clean homepage.
implementation_plan: Do not try to index parameter URLs.
Keep canonical to homepage.
Monitor only unless GSC starts showing canonical conflicts.

rows.gsc_reason: Alternate page with proper canonical tag
rows.rationale: A page*.html URL is a technical Tilda path. Even if canonical is correct, redirecting public legacy page URLs reduces duplicate crawl noise.
implementation_plan: Verify the exact current page represented by page35668815.html.
If it corresponds to events, redirect to `/events`.
If not, map it to the matching clean alias.
Do not prioritize above 404 and robots issues.

rows.rationale: This appears to be a public future/date event page. It can support entity SEO if it has event/news schema and links from the event hub.
implementation_plan: Confirm the event is public and should be found in search.
Add Event/NewsArticle schema, clear date, place, speaker and organization fields.
Link from `/events`, `/speaker`, and relevant news/lecture hubs.
If it was only a test, set noindex and remove from sitemap.

rows.rationale: Likely a dated public event page. It should either become a structured event/news page or be kept out of the index if it is a draft.
implementation_plan: Classify as public event, archive, or test.
For public event: add Event schema and internal links.
For test/draft: noindex/remove from sitemap.

rows.rationale: Likely a dated conference/publication page. It can strengthen author/entity SEO if structured correctly.
implementation_plan: Classify as public event, archive, or test.
For public event: add Event/NewsArticle schema and internal links.
For test/draft: noindex/remove from sitemap.

rows.rationale: The sitemap already has `/abuse_gaslight`, so `/about_gaslight` looks like a duplicate/old topic URL.
implementation_plan: Verify whether `/about_gaslight` exists in Tilda or external links.
If duplicate, redirect to `/abuse_gaslight`.
If unique, merge content or assign a clear canonical to avoid two gaslighting pages competing.

rows.rationale: This page is live and in sitemap but may be outside the core psychology/EI/service positioning. It should not be optimized unless it supports the site strategy.
implementation_plan: Decide whether aromatherapy belongs to the public expert cluster.
If yes: improve title/description/H1 and link it from a relevant article hub.
If no: set noindex or remove from sitemap to avoid diluting topical authority.

rows.rationale: Teen gadget addiction is relevant to consultations, adolescents and psychology content. This page should be strengthened rather than ignored.
implementation_plan: Add unique SEO metadata and Article/FAQ schema.
Link from adolescent consultation pages and knowledge base.
Add image alt and author/entity references to Tatyana Munn/Kumskova.

rows.rationale: Toxic work content supports consultations, workplace conflict pages and emotional intelligence positioning.
implementation_plan: Add unique SEO metadata and Article/FAQ schema.
Link from workplace conflict/service pages and EI article hub.
Connect to author/entity schema.

rows.rationale: The sitemap contains `/articles/eq-dlya-rukovoditeley`; the GSC URL looks like an alternate/old slug for the same leadership EI topic.
implementation_plan: Verify that both slugs refer to the same topic.
Redirect the old slug to `/articles/eq-dlya-rukovoditeley`.
Improve the target page for leadership/EI search intent.

rows.rationale: This is one of the four strategic site blocks and should be indexable as a hub if it is public.
implementation_plan: Strengthen as a hub with unique title/description/H1.
Add internal links to EI article and knowledge-base clusters.
Add BreadcrumbList and ItemList schema for hub structure.

rows.rationale: `/cta` sounds like a utility call-to-action page, not a search landing. It should not be indexed unless it is a real public page.
implementation_plan: Verify page purpose in Tilda.
If utility/test: set noindex and remove from sitemap.
If public landing: rename, add unique metadata and link from hubs.

rows.rationale: Google crawled the article hub but did not index it. As a strategic EI hub, it needs stronger uniqueness, internal links and structured data.
implementation_plan: Add unique title/description/H1 and intro copy around emotional intelligence articles.
Add ItemList schema listing the child articles.
Link to/from the main EI hub and knowledge-base hub.

rows.rationale: A matching sitemap URL exists as `/why-ei-matters`; the GSC URL is a broken old slug.
implementation_plan: Redirect `/emotional-intelligence/articles/why-it-matters` to `/emotional-intelligence/articles/why-ei-matters`.
Check internal links that may still point to the old slug.
Improve the canonical target page metadata and internal linking.

rows.rationale: Family psychologist search intent is commercially relevant. This should be strengthened or consolidated with service pages.
implementation_plan: Check whether this duplicates `/uslugi_sohranit_brak`, `/uslugi_razvod`, or consultation hub pages.
If unique: add service-focused metadata and links.
If duplicate: redirect to the strongest canonical family consultation page.

rows.rationale: The page is live but may be outside the core psychology/EI topical map. Google crawled but did not index it, which may be appropriate.
implementation_plan: Decide whether this supports the expert content strategy.
If non-core: noindex/remove from sitemap.
If core: rewrite around psychological/behavioral relevance and link from a suitable hub.

rows.rationale: A page*.html URL is a technical Tilda legacy path. It should be mapped to a clean alias or noindexed/removed if test content.
implementation_plan: Identify the page title in Tilda.
If it has public value, assign a clean alias and redirect the page*.html URL.
If it is test/private, noindex/remove from sitemap.

rows.rationale: The slug suggests testimonials/reviews. If it duplicates `/otzivi`, consolidate to one reviews page.
implementation_plan: Verify page content.
If duplicate testimonials: redirect to `/otzivi`.
If separate public proof page: optimize and link from homepage/contact/service pages.
If test: noindex/remove.

rows.rationale: Tilda tpost URLs are often duplicate post URLs. They should not compete with canonical site pages.
implementation_plan: Export the exact tpost URLs from GSC.
Map each to the matching article/page canonical.
Redirect or canonicalize; keep AMP/tpost variants out of the sitemap.

rows.rationale: AMP parameter variants are usually not canonical pages. They should consolidate to canonical article URLs.
implementation_plan: Export exact AMP URLs.
Verify canonical tags.
Avoid optimizing AMP variants directly.

next_execution_batches.name: Public hubs and articles to strengthen
